hooks.command:
CURRENT=$(git -C "$(pwd)" rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo 'unknown'); HIGHEST=$(git -C "$(pwd)" branch -a 2>/dev/null | grep -oE 'Claude_0\.[0-9]+' | sort -t. -k2 -n | tail -1); if [ -z "$HIGHEST" ]; then NEXT='Claude_0.1'; else NUM=$(echo "$HIGHEST" | grep -oE '[0-9]+$'); NEXT="Claude_0.$((NUM + 1))"; fi; printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"⚠️  BRANCH DISCIPLINE (CLAUDE.md)
Current branch: %s
Next sequential branch: %s

Before any git work, confirm with the user which branch to use. Never commit directly to main. Default to creating %s unless the user specifies otherwise."}}' "$CURRENT" "$NEXT" "$NEXT"
